name: CreateWebhook
description: Create a new webhook that subscribes to status changes of your resources. Mollie will send HTTP POST requests to your specified URL when events occur.

url.description: The URL Mollie will send the events to. This URL must be publicly accessible and able to receive HTTP POST requests.

name.description: A descriptive name that identifies the webhook.

event_types.description: Event types to enable. Can be a list of specific events (e.g., ['payment-link.paid', 'sales-invoice.paid']) or '*' for all standard events.

testmode.description: Creates the webhook in test or live mode. Set to true for test mode, false for live mode. Defaults to false (live mode).
